cit:title.gco:CharacterString: EEA reference grid for Europe (100km), May 2011

mri:abstract.gco:CharacterString: The grid is based on proposal at the 1st European Workshop on Reference Grids in 2003 and later INSPIRE geographical grid systems.

cit:title.gcx:Anchor: Continents, countries, sea regions of the world.

mri:keyword.gcx:Anchor: Report on progress and implementation (Article 17, Habitats Directive)

mco:otherConstraints.gco:CharacterString: License CC-BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Copyright holder: European Environment Agency (EEA).

cit:title.gcx:Anchor: INSPIRE Specification on Geographical Grid Systems - Guidelines

Commission Regulation (EU) No 1089/2010 of 23 November 2010 implementing Directive 2007/2/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council as regards interoperability of spatial data sets and services

mrl:statement.gco:CharacterString: The reference grids are based on ETRS89 Lambert Azimuthal Equal Area projection with parameters: latitude of origin 52°N, longitude of origin 10°E, false northing 3210000.0m, false easting 4321000.0m. Origin of the grid is calculated from 0mN 0mE of projection. The method followed the instructions for the EEA fishnet tool described in the EEA GIS guideline available from http://www.eionet.europa.eu/gis.
